Lite Search Handoff

Static seed surface. No JavaScript, no live search, no live source probes, no downloads.

Lite Overview Search Sources Evals Demo Queries Limitations

This is a static no-JS search handoff for old browsers. Hosted public search is not configured, and this page does not run Python.

The local/prototype runtime mode is local_index_only. No live probes, downloads, installs, uploads, accounts, arbitrary URL fetch, local path search, scraping, crawling, or telemetry are enabled.

The hosted form is intentionally disabled until a future backend is configured and verified.

For local prototype use, run python scripts/demo_web_workbench.py --mode public_alpha --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 from a checkout and open http://127.0.0.1:8080/search?q=windows+7+apps.

  • windows 7 apps
  • latest firefox before xp support ended
  • driver.inf
  • thinkpad t42 wifi windows 2000
  • pc magazine ray tracing

Machine-readable handoff: ../data/search_handoff.json

Eureka is a Python reference backend prototype, not production. This surface uses no scraping, performs no live source probes, and makes no external search calls. external baselines pending/manual; source placeholders remain placeholders.
